rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARGUERITA L. RUBEL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent D. Crabtree'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgement On The Pleadings As To The Third Cause Oif Action Of The Petition.
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Crabtree's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings as to Petitioner Daniel Rubel's Third Cause of Action is granted. The Trust attached to the Petition sets forth methods by which a successor trustee may be appointed. The Petition makes the bare allegation that Daniel Rubel was the trustee at the time the third and fourth amended were mailed to him. However, the Petition fails to allege how or under what circumstances Daniel Rubel became trustee. Absent such allegations, the Trust attached to the Petition names Marguerite Rubel as the Trustee. Thus, upon execution of the Third and Fourth Amendments, there was delivery to Marguerite Rubel the Settlor and acting Trustee. Crabtree's request for judicial notice that the San Francisco Superior Court's records contain no order removing Marguerite Rubel as trustee of her Trust is granted. Daniel Rubel's Request for Judicial Notice of the first and third page of Respondent's Opposition filed 9/30/2011 and of Daniel Rubel's Petition for Appointment of Probate Conservator of the Person of Marguerite Rubel is granted. If any party wishes to argue the motion, you must advise opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) before 5:00 p.m. on Tuesday, 12/6/11.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARGUERITA L. RUBEL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent D. Crabtree'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgement On The Pleadings As To The Fourth And Fifth Causes Of Action Of The Petition.
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Crabtree's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings as to Petitioner Daniel Rubel's Fourth and Fifth Causes of Action is denied. Although the causes of action refer to 850(3)(A) &(C) (sic) in the title, the relief requested is for breach of contract and quantum meruit. The claims were brought against the trust within one year of decedent's death and are timely. Daniel Rubel's Request for Judicial Notice of the Stipulation signed 4/272/11 and filed 10/31/11; of the pleading of the affirmative defense filed 9/30/11; of the Notice of Motion and Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings filed on 3/9/11; and that neither Crabtree nor the SPCA filed an opposition to Daniel Rubel's Notice of Motion and Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings filed on 3/9/11 is granted. If any party wishes to argue the motion, you must advise opposing counsel and the court (415-551-3702) before 5:00 p.m. on Tuesday, 12/6/11.
